identity.lead_description: Adult female influencer remake subject drawn from the default influencer references for the reveal scene only. Scene_001 is a hands-only prop teaser and should not use face or full-body identity references.

background.change_policy: Do not introduce furniture, graphics, or a new location.

composition.framing: scene_001 is a garment-only close-up; scene_002 is a centered mid-thigh fashion reveal
composition.look: clean minimal fashion short with casual indoor realism

elements: heather-gray strapless knit garment held flat toward camera
both hands pinching the upper corners
heather-gray tube top matching the teased garment
short black bob with soft bangs

scene_overrides.motion_intent: tiny natural hand tremble with barely perceptible fabric flutter and no body reveal
subtle confident sway with light overshirt drift and breathing

notes: Nano Banana 2 remains the default because both scenes are easiest to build from reference-led composition rather than isolated wardrobe editing.
Grok Imagine is still the preferred fallback if a later workflow edits only the reveal outfit on an already-approved base frame.
